home.name: I'm Ann Kilzer.
home.bio: My career is in software engineering — currently working as a Senior Software Engineer. I'm a polymath who codes, paints, and explores the great outdoors.

background.title: Background
background.body: I grew up in Missoula, Montana and attended Gonzaga University, where I majored in Computer Science, Mathematics, and Art. I went on to earn a Master's in CS from UT Austin, where I researched privacy.

japan.title: Japan Life
japan.body: I moved to Tokyo in early 2018 with an eager dream of learning about culture and fine art. In my spare time I enjoy Japanese Calligraphy 書道, drawing, cooking, hiking, and riding slow trains around Japan.
